name: war-of-the-ring
description: Unofficial fan-made digital port of War of the Ring 2nd Edition (Ares Games). Base game only. Ships no publisher art — see README.

scripts.build: node scripts/copy-dev-assets.mjs && vite build && node scripts/strip-images-from-dist.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name war-of-the-ring --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.test: node scripts/audit-layout.mjs && vite-node scripts/verify-setup.mjs && vite-node scripts/tournament.mjs --games 40 --fp random --shadow random && vite-node scripts/smoke-server.mjs
